author: lOrm
content: Honoured replace_all=true via the existing #687 implementation in src/tools/file/edit.rs (multi-occurrence path uses content.replace; single-occurrence path unchanged). Added two #569-banner tests: fix569_replace_all_true_with_three_matches_replaces_all (3 matches all rewritten, success message reports count) and fix569_replace_all_false_default_preserves_single_match_behavior (default omits flag, single match still uses singular success message). Verified: cargo test --lib fix569 → 2/2 pass.
